name: Twelve Seas Investment Co III/Cayman
business: Twelve Seas Investment Co III/Cayman is a blank check company formed to effect a merger or acquisition with one or more businesses. It has not yet identified a target and has generated no operating revenues. Its search focuses on global companies outside the United States, with an emphasis on established profitable enterprises in oil and gas and other proven sectors.

exposures.sentence: We intend to focus our search on global companies located outside the United States, with an emphasis on established profitable enterprises in oil and gas and other sectors which our management team believes to be proven.
While we may acquire a business in any industry and in any geographic location, our focus will be on international companies located, including in the Pan-Eurasian region and Africa.

catalysts.event: Deadline to complete initial Business Combination
catalysts.sentence: We must complete our initial Business Combination by (i) December 15, 2027, the end of our Combination Period, which is 24 months from the closing of our Initial Public Offering.

catalysts.event: Separate trading of Public Units into Class A Ordinary Shares and Public Rights
catalysts.sentence: On January 7, 2026, we announced that, commencing on January 9, 2026, the holders of the Public Units may elect to separately trade the Class A Ordinary Shares and the Public Rights included in the Public Units.
